# CaptureAI - AI-Powered Screenshot Answers for Students

> CaptureAI provides an AI-powered browser extension that quickly captures on-screen questions and delivers instant answers across various learning platforms, emphasizing privacy and ease of use.

## Core Content

- How CaptureAI reads and understands on-screen questions, including text, multiple-choice options, diagrams, and math or science problems
- Features such as screenshot capture, floating interface, stealth mode, ask mode, auto-solve, and privacy guard
- Instructions on installing and activating the extension
- Usage guides on capturing questions and obtaining answers seamlessly
- How Privacy Guard prevents detection on quiz platforms
- FAQs addressing browser support, detection, answer accuracy, and platform compatibility (Canvas, Moodle, Blackboard, Top Hat, Schoology)
- Pricing plans, including Basic and Pro tiers with features list

## Learning Platform Compatibility

- Details on how CaptureAI works across learning platforms
- Compatibility explanation with Canvas, Moodle, Blackboard, Top Hat, and other LMS
- Functionality regarding math, science, and varied question formats

## Features and Functionality

- How the floating panel and stealth mode operate
- Privacy protection features to hide extension activity
- Auto-solve capabilities for specific platforms
- Ask mode for detailed explanations
- How the extension reads and delivers answers without pop-ups or traces

## Resources

- Get Started links for installation and activation
- Feature exploration and FAQs for troubleshooting and detailed understanding
- Pricing and subscription options

## Optional

- Privacy and security explanations
- Detailing on auto-answering capabilities with examples
- Additional tips for effective usage of the extension
